sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الخَطُّ العَرَبِيُّ فَنًّا بَصَرِيًّا فَرِيدًا يَمْزِجُ بَيْنَ الجَمَالِ الهَنْدَسِيِّ وَالرُّوحَانِيَّةِ العَمِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija se smatra jedinstvenom vizuelnom umjetnošću koja spaja geometrijsku ljepotu i duboku duhovnost.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is considered a unique visual art that blends geometric beauty with deep spirituality.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الخَطُّ مُجَرَّدَ وَسِيلَةٍ لِلتَّدْوِينِ، بَلْ تَطَوَّرَ لِيُصْبِحَ عَمَلًا فَنِّيًّا يُزَيِّنُ المَسَاجِدَ وَالقُصُورَ وَالمَخْطُوطَاتِ القَدِيمَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kaligrafija nije bila samo sredstvo zapisivanja, već se razvila u umjetničko djelo koje krasi džamije, palate i stare rukopise.
sentences.translationEn: Calligraphy was not just a means of recording, but evolved to become an artwork decorating mosques, palaces, and ancient manuscripts.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَدَّدُ أَنْوَاعُهُ بَيْنَ الثُّلُثِ وَالنَّسْخِ وَالكُوفِيِّ، وَلِكُلِّ نَوْعٍ قَوَاعِدُهُ الصَّارِمَةُ الَّتِي تَتَطَلَّبُ سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ التَّدْرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Postoje brojni stilovi, poput Thulutha, Naskha i Kufija, a svaki stil ima svoja stroga pravila koja zahtijevaju godine vježbanja.
sentences.translationEn: Its types vary between Thuluth, Naskh, and Kufic, and each type has its strict rules that require years of training.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ الفَنَّانُ فِي رَسْمِ الحُرُوفِ عَلَى التَّنَاغُمِ وَالتَّوَازُنِ، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ يَبْدُو وَكَأَنَّهُ يَرْقُصُ عَلَى الوَرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnik se pri iscrtavanju slova oslanja na harmoniju i ravnotežu, zbog čega tekst izgleda kao da pleše na papiru.
sentences.translationEn: The artist relies on harmony and balance in drawing letters, making the text appear as if it is dancing on paper.

sentences.arabic: فِي العَصْرِ الحَدِيثِ، دَمَجَ الفَنَّانُونَ الخَطَّ مَعَ الفُنُونِ التَّشْكِيلِيَّةِ المُعَاصِرَةِ لِيُنْتِجُوا مَا يُسَمَّى 'الحُرُوفِيَّةَ'.
sentences.translation: U modernom dobu, umjetnici su spojili kaligrafiju sa savremenim likovnim umjetnostima kako bi stvorili ono što se naziva 'Hurufiyya'.
sentences.translationEn: In the modern era, artists merged calligraphy with contemporary plastic arts to produce what is called 'Hurufiyya'.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الإِرْثُ العَرِيقُ يَظَلُّ شَاهِدًا عَلَى عَبْقَرِيَّةِ الحَضَارَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ وَاهْتِمَامِهَا بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ الجَمَالِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo drevno naslijeđe ostaje svjedok genijalnosti arapske civilizacije i njene posvećenosti estetskim detaljima.
sentences.translationEn: This ancient heritage remains a witness to the genius of Arab civilization and its interest in aesthetic details.
